---
title: "Usage examples"
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(unsum)
```

## CLOSURE

3,800,640 values in a few seconds:
```{r}
closure_generate(
    mean = "3.8",
    sd = "1.5",
    n = 120,
    scale_min = 1,
    scale_max = 5
)
```

16,701,150 values in a few seconds:
```{r}
closure_generate(
    mean = "3.0",
    sd = "1.0",
    n = 150,
    scale_min = 1,
    scale_max = 5
)
```

25,278,450 in a few seconds:
```{r}
closure_generate(
    mean = "3.0",
    sd = "1.5",
    n = 150,
    scale_min = 1,
    scale_max = 5
)
```
